title: Create: Orbital
description: A modpack built around Create and Ad Astra
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/229a8d821e4135cd43eb181a6026146dd6b7570c.png)

## Overview

"Create: Orbital" is a Minecraft modpack that combines the best of engineering, space exploration, world-building, and immersive decoration. By blending the _Create_ mod with _Ad Astra_, this pack takes you on an exciting journey from building intricate mechanical contraptions to exploring the stars. With additional enhancements like _Terralith_ for dynamic world generation and various decoration mods, "Create: Orbital" offers a rich and diverse experience that pushes the boundaries of what Minecraft can do.

## Mechanical Engineering with Create

At the heart of "Create: Orbital" is the _Create_ mod, known for its complex and visually impressive engineering systems. You can design massive factories, automate machines, and create intricate contraptions using gears, belts, and more. This mod adds a whole new level of creativity to building and automation, allowing you to construct everything from simple machines to complex factory systems that could power entire space stations or orbital factories.

## Space Exploration with Ad Astra

The _Ad Astra_ mod brings space exploration to life. In "Create: Orbital," you’ll journey beyond Earth to explore the vastness of space. Build rockets, travel to distant planets, and establish new colonies. The mod adds new dimensions, planets, and resources, creating an exciting and challenging environment for players who want to push the limits of their engineering creations. With this mod, you can expand your mechanical creations from the ground to the stars!

## Stunning Worlds with Terralith

World-building is taken to new heights with _Terralith_, a world generation mod that enhances Minecraft’s terrain with breathtaking landscapes. From towering mountains to lush forests and alien-like biomes, Terralith transforms your world into a more vibrant and immersive environment. This mod offers a perfect backdrop for your mechanical creations and space stations, giving you the freedom to build and explore in an endlessly varied and beautiful world.

## Immersive Decorations

To top off your creations, "Create: Orbital" includes a selection of decoration mods that allow you to customize and personalize your builds. Whether you’re looking to furnish your space station, add intricate details to your factories, or just make your world feel more alive, these mods bring new furniture, lighting, and structural elements to give your creations an extra touch of realism and charm.
